series_metadata.series_description: This is a record of claimants with lost-time claims on which all hearings and order for payments are recorded. These records are in claim number order and show that particular claims have been destroyed. These records along with item C-24 comprise the entire listing of destroyed claims.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Microfilm is then sent to the State Records Center Film Vault for 20 years then destroyed ; Paper: Hard copy to be microfilmed. Hard copy then destroyed, Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
